sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n77665" key="pantopwli/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παντο-πωλία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n77665.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">dealing in all kinds of wares</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0417.tlg001:31" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Archipp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">31</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
